alt: Looking along the wooden plank deck of the Puente de los Suspiros in Barranco with its signature globe-shaped lamp posts on cast-iron poles, yellow-ochre colonial walls on both sides, palm trees and people descending the staircases toward the Bajada de los Baños ravine
description: View along the wooden plank deck of the Puente de los Suspiros (1876) in Barranco, Lima. The 33-meter footbridge descends through the colonial Bajada de los Baños ravine to the Pacific. A famous Chabuca Granda song takes its name from this bridge.
title: Bridge of Sighs (Puente de los Suspiros), Barranco, Lima
